refnamediv.refpurpose: Restore an image with regularized deconvolution.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Performs frequency-domain L2-regularized deconvolution. lambda controls the strength of noise suppression. The best demonstration uses the same point-spread function and boundary model for blurring and restoration; otherwise residual blur and ringing are expected.

refsection.title: Examples
